hypothesis: Pretraining X-MoPA to predict computed electronic density-of-states (DOS) embeddings from the crystal graph and text modalities, in addition to the existing XRD/text/graph predictions, will produce a statistically significant reduction in band-gap MAE on Matbench and AFLOW compared to the original three-modality X-MoPA, indicating that DOS contributes non-redundant electronic-structure information not captured by graphs, XRD, or textual descriptions.
